postReview.title: Everton 2-0 Burnley: Moyes' men rediscover home comforts
postReview.description: Everton ended their winless streak on home soil, while boosting their European hopes, following a routine victory over struggling Burnley.

postReview.title: Everton 2-0 Burnley: los de Moyes vuelven a hacerse fuertes en casa
postReview.description: El Everton puso fin a su racha sin ganar en casa y reforzó sus opciones europeas tras una cómoda victoria ante un Burnley en apuros.

postReview.title: Everton-Burnley 2-0: la squadra di Moyes ritrova il fattore campo
postReview.description: L'Everton interrompe il digiuno in casa e rilancia le ambizioni europee: Burnley battuto 2-0

postReview.title: Everton 2-0 Burnley: time de Moyes volta a se sentir em casa
postReview.description: Everton encerra jejum em casa e ganha força na briga por vagas europeias com vitória tranquila sobre o Burnley

postReview.title: Everton 2-0 Burnley : les hommes de Moyes renouent avec le succès à domicile
postReview.description: Everton a mis fin à sa disette à domicile et relancé ses ambitions européennes grâce à un succès tranquille contre un Burnley en difficulté.

postReview.title: Everton 2:0 Burnley: Moyes' Team findet zu Hause zurück in die Erfolgsspur
postReview.description: Everton beendete mit einem souveränen Sieg gegen das strauchelnde Burnley die sieglose Heimserie und belebte zugleich die Europapokal-Hoffnungen.

postReview.title: إيفرتون 2-0 بيرنلي: رجال مويس يستعيدون نغمة الانتصارات على أرضهم
postReview.description: إيفرتون ينهي سلسلة اللافوز على أرضه ويعزّز آماله الأوروبية بعد انتصار روتيني على بيرنلي المتعثر.

postReview.title: Everton 2-0 Burnley: equipa de Moyes volta a sentir-se em casa
postReview.description: Everton acaba com jejum em casa e reforça ambições europeias com vitória tranquila sobre o aflito Burnley

preReview.title: Moyes eager for Everton to kick on after reaching magic 40-point mark
preReview.description: Everton take on Burnley in the Premier League on Tuesday, with the Toffees looking up the table after reaching 40 points with 10 games left.

preReview.title: Moyes quiere que el Everton dé un paso más tras alcanzar la mágica cifra de 40 puntos
preReview.description: El Everton recibe al Burnley el martes en la Premier League, con los Toffees mirando hacia la zona alta de la tabla tras alcanzar los 40 puntos a falta de 10 jornadas.

preReview.title: Moyes quer ver o Everton embalar após alcançar a marca mágica de 40 pontos
preReview.description: Everton enfrenta o Burnley na Premier League nesta terça-feira, com os Toffees em alta na tabela após chegar aos 40 pontos com 10 jogos restantes.

preReview.title: Moyes vuole un Everton in crescita dopo il traguardo dei 40 punti
preReview.description: Everton-Burnley martedì in Premier League: Toffees in risalita dopo aver raggiunto quota 40 punti con 10 partite ancora da giocare.

preReview.title: Moyes veut voir Everton accélérer après avoir atteint la barre symbolique des 40 points
preReview.description: Everton reçoit Burnley mardi en Premier League : les Toffees visent plus haut après avoir atteint les 40 points à 10 matches de la fin.

preReview.title: Moyes will, dass Everton nach dem magischen 40-Punkte-Meilenstein nachlegt
preReview.description: Everton trifft am Dienstag in der Premier League auf Burnley. Nach dem Erreichen der 40-Punkte-Marke bei noch zehn ausstehenden Spielen wollen die Toffees in der Tabelle weiter nach oben.

preReview.title: مويس متحمس لانطلاقة جديدة لإيفرتون بعد بلوغ «الـ40 نقطة السحرية»
preReview.description: يستضيف إيفرتون بيرنلي في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز يوم الثلاثاء، حيث يتطلع «التوفيز» إلى التقدم في جدول الترتيب بعد بلوغ 40 نقطة قبل 10 مباريات من النهاية.

preReview.title: Moyes quer ver o Everton embalar depois de atingir a meta dos 40 pontos
preReview.description: Everton defronta o Burnley na Premier League na terça-feira, com os Toffees a olharem para os lugares cimeiros depois de chegarem aos 40 pontos com 10 jogos por disputar.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
